VariableReference.description: A reference to a variable. Format: $(<content>). The content inside the parentheses is validated by the semantic validator.

NotVariableReference.description: Matches any value that is not a variable reference.

SchemaTypedVariableReference.description: A reference to a variable, with expected type of the value to be specified by the parent schema via the varRef keyword.

StringOrVar.description: A String value or a reference to a variable of type String.

IntegerOrVar.description: An Integer value or a reference to a variable of type Integer.

NumberOrVar.description: A Number value or a reference to a variable of type Number.

BooleanOrVar.description: A Boolean value or a reference to a variable of type Boolean.

ValueOrVar.description: Any JSON value, or a variable reference.
